zh.Nettlestead, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tibetot於1370年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft29歲，母親Margaret Deincourt27歲。她於1385年11月23日之前與Phillip Spencer在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年4月20日在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德享年88歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tibetot于1370年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft29岁，母亲Margaret Deincourt27岁。她于1385年11月23日之前与Phillip Spencer在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年4月20日在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德享年88岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可登維其格也福利亞斯 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tibetot was born in 1370, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Deincourt, was 27. She married Phillip Spencer before 23 November 1385, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 20 April 1458, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, at the age of 88, and was buried in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tibetot est née en 1370, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Deincourt, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Phillip Spencer avant 23 novembre 1385, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1458, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tibetot 1370 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret Deincourt 27. Sie hat vor 23. November 1385 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Phillip Spencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. April 1458 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England und wurde in Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tibetot è nata il nel 1370 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret Deincourt, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Phillip Spencer prima del 23 novembre 1385, nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1458, nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, England.

ja.Nettlestead, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクネットレステアド
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tibetotが1370年にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoftは29歳，母Margaret Deincourtは27歳であった。1385年11月23日以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドでPhillip Spencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年4月20日にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで88歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクダンウィチグレイフリアルズ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tibetot(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Deincourt(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1385년 11월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 Phillip Spencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 4월 20일 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 던위치 그리프리아르스 프리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tibetot nasceu em 1370, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Deincourt, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Phillip Spencer antes 23 de novembro de 1385, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1458, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tibetot родилась в 1370 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Deincourt, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Phillip Spencer перед 23 ноябрь 1385 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 апреля 1458 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности грифрярс приори, дунвич, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tibetot nació en 1370, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Deincourt, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Phillip Spencer antes de 23 de noviembre de 1385, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1458, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Greyfriars Priory, Dunwich, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
